svg.title: Talent Pilot System Design Flow
svg.desc: Expanded runtime architecture: frontend, backend API, hosted queue, worker process, Ollama, SQL, files, and providers
svg.text: Expanded runtime architecture: frontend, backend API, hosted queue, worker process, Ollama, SQL, files, and providers
Tenant Admin, Presales, PMO, Recruiter, Hiring
JD draft, CV parse, matching, RAG, interview questions, headhunting
Inside API process; not durable across restart
6 OS processes observed: npm wrapper, Angular server, dotnet API wrapper,
REST JSON requests carry JWT; SignalR uses the same
Controllers pass DTOs to services with tenant/user
Worker claims outbox rows and sends via provider.
Agents call Ollama and persist runs plus vectors.
Expanded SVG layout: wider lanes, routed elbows, and separated labels to avoid card/arrow overlap.
